group_protocol.name: Group Boot Workflow 33 Neko XHS Group Protocol
group_protocol.summary: 定义当前 group 的最小行为边界、群组内正式规则来源与可扩展协作约束。

sections.objective: 定义当前 group 内生效的最小行为边界。

step1.semantic_description: Server advances only when manager formally closes startup plan stage.

step2.semantic_description: Server advances only when manager formally closes capability check stage.

step3.semantic_description: Server advances only when manager formally closes readiness stage.

task_start.semantic_description: Manager emits the formal start signal after bootstrap closes.
